claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.rolePolicy: No role or landmark is added by the component.

layout.intrinsic: Inline size is fluid and max-inline-size is selected from semantic container tokens.
layout.safeArea: Physical safe-area inset values are mapped to the correct logical edges in LTR and RTL.
layout.overflow: The root uses min-inline-size zero and never clips descendants.

consumerResponsibilities: Place Container inside the correct document landmark instead of adding a role only for styling.
Keep focusable descendants visible when adding consumer overflow or sticky styles.
Revalidate safe-area and 400% reflow after overriding gutters or maximum widths.
